notes: Virginia has 95 counties and 38 independent cities (133 voting jurisdictions). Census data covers 144 cities/towns but not the 95 counties. Census fields appear only for independent cities where a city-level match exists in va_census.json.

sources.voter_registration: Virginia Department of Elections, November 2024 Monthly Locality Statistics
